raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee ne fintaja/ ka Jah-\
feſs to buhtu prattis / jo tur bija\
Tulks ſtarp teem."
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch nowehrfahs no\
teem/ un raudaja/ un atgreeſahs\
atkaſ us teem / un runnaja ar\
teem / un nehme Sihmeanu no\
teem/ un faistija to preeſſch winno\
Azzim."
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Jahſeps pawehleja/ ka\
winnt Maiſi ar Labbibu pilditi\
un winno Nauda / iﬀatram fa-\
wâ Maiſâ atdohta taptu / un ka\
teem Zelka-Barriba dohta taptu\
us Zeltu / un tas tappe teem ta\
darrihts."
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee uſktahwe ſawu\
Labbibu us fatweem Ehſeteem/un\
aiſgahje no turrenes."
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Kad nu weens no teem fa-\
wu Maiſu atraifija / ſawu Ehſeli\
barroht Mahjas-Weetâ / tad ee-\
raudſtja tas ſawu Naudu / un\
redſi/ ta bija winna Maiſa Wir-\
Galla."
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tas fazzija us fatweem\
Brahſeem : Manna Nauda irr\
man atdohta / un redſi/ ta irr ar-\
ri mannâ Maiſâ / tad iſtruhſa\
teem ta Girds / un pahrbihja-\
jahs/ weens uhs ohtru fazzidami:\
Ras tas irr/ fo Deews mums irr\
darrijis?"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee nahze pee Jehkaba/\
fawa Tehwa/ us Kaniâna-Sem-\
mi/ un teize tam wiſſu / kas teem\
bij notizzis/ un fazzija :"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tas Wihrs / tahs Sem-\
mes Kungs runnaja bahrgi ar"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "mums / un turreja mu\
Semmes Iſluhkeem."
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzijam meh\
to : Mehs eſſam ustizzami,\
ne eſſam Iſluhſi bijufchi."
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Mehs bijam diw\
mits Brahſi muhfa Tehwo\
li/ weens newa wairs / u\
masaks irr wehl chodeen pe\
fu Tehwa / Kanâana Se"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas Wihrs /\
Senies Kungs fazzija us n\
Pee to es nomannischu\
ustizzamus eſſam / pa\
weenu no juhſu Brahſe\
man/ un neinmeet preeſſo\
NaminaWaijadſibas/un"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un atweddeet juh\
faku Brahſi pee man/ tad\
mannischu juhs ne eſſam\
kus / bet ustizzamus :\
Brahſi es juims atdohſch\
taufchu juims juhſu Prezzi\
schinni Semmê."
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un kad tee fatwus\
sus isbehre/ rangi/ tad a\
ikweens ſawu Naudas M\
fawâ Maiſâ / un tee eer\
fatwus Naudas Muſkuſue\
ni/un winno Tehws/ un t\
jajahs."
    },
    {
      "n": 36,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija Jehkab\
no Tehws us teem : Ju\
neinmat man mummus\
nus/ Jahſepa twairs new\
Sihmeanu newa wairs/ n\
feet juhs Benjaminnu /\
ſchahs Leetas wirs mañim"
    },
    {
      "n": 37,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad runnaja Ri\
ar ſawu Tehwu / un fazz"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
